headline: Celestica Earnings, Guidance Strong. But The AI Play Dives Late.
summary: Celestica reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings while revenue just edged above consensus. The AI data center play guided higher, but Celestica stock fell solidly in after-hours action. Celestica earnings surged 80% to $2.
